description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!  Product DetailsCase style: Black plastic round caseDial style: Black dial with black and white handsStrap style: Black textured plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset timeWaterproof to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 30 mmCase thickness: 5 mm
